_doc: Maintainable list of special-styled chapter blocks that have NO self-evident markup. Keys are chapter numbers; each entry tags the paragraph run from `from`..`to` (inclusive) with a CSS class family `<type>`/`<type>-top`/`<type>-bot`, styled in assets/css/main.css. Anchors match a paragraph's PLAIN TEXT (tags + entities decoded), smallest valid span wins. `node devScripts/import-gdoc.mjs` re-validates anchors after an import and warns on misses. Most special blocks are AUTO-detected and need NO entry here: lore/system boxes (5+ ===/--- delimited), `[ ... ]` system messages (+ italic = announcement), business `card` (━━━ delimited), `terminal` (₩/※ shop runs), `options` (numbered lists), `panel` (MIN MAX gauge). Only list types with no reliable signal: idcard, chat, note, voice (spaced-caps mascot/system voice, e.g. `G O O D B O Y`), scroll (in-world invitation/manual text framed by `+++` in the source). A box delimiter shorter than the auto threshold (e.g. a `===` User-Guide box) is also listed by its content lines. Lone box-edge glyph lines (`+++`, `===`) framing a listed block are auto-hidden by enhance.mjs. NOTE: a listed entry styles ONE span (smallest from..to); a line that repeats identically in a chapter (e.g. `G O O D B O Y`) can only be tagged at its first occurrence.

1.from: -Is it true Kim Soleum turned down a girl he liked because he was too scared to watch the horror movie she wanted to see?

4.to: : Congratulations. You have been officially hired by Daydream Corporation's Field Exploration team.

14.from: -Did you guys see the official notice that just went up?

40.to: You are currently viewing the manual document summarizing the existing visitors to our exhibition.

40.from: Before reading the following content, we would like to inform you that you have been invited to a very wonderful exhibition.
40.to: Before reading the following content, we would like to inform you that you have been invited to a very wonderful exhibition.

40.from: To ensure your journey is not cumbersome, from now on, you will arrive at the exhibition no matter where you head.

40.from: We will guide you through the common reviews of nine visitors to this exhibition, tentatively collected by Daydream Inc.
